diagrams.title: Waste Segregation Categories
diagrams.description: Three-bin system for source segregation of municipal solid waste
elements: Green Bin - Wet/Biodegradable (kitchen waste, garden waste)
Blue Bin - Dry/Recyclable (paper, plastic, glass, metals)
Black/Yellow Bin - Domestic Hazardous (batteries, paints, chemicals)

diagrams.title: Waste Management Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Priority-based approach to waste management from most to least preferred
elements: Reuse - Use again for same purpose
diagrams.purpose: Understanding priority order in waste management

diagrams.title: Solid Waste Management Flow
diagrams.description: End-to-end flow of solid waste from generation to disposal

diagrams.title: Stakeholders and Responsibilities
diagrams.description: Visual representation of different stakeholders and their duties
elements: Waste Generators - Segregate and hand over
diagrams.purpose: Understanding roles and responsibilities of all stakeholders

visuals.title: Solid Waste Management Rules 2016
visuals.description: Visual diagram for solid waste management rules 2016
